title: troximon
intro: Troximon, also known as Senecio inaequidens, is a plant species within the sunflower family that is native to New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. Troximon has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for use, although its preparation and use should be done under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
